trending_videos.title: Black Clover Second Season | Official Trailer 3 | Crunchyroll
trending_videos.description:
A new saga begins! Black Clover Second Season is coming to Crunchyroll in 2026! Watch Black Clover on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-bcpv

In a world where magic is everything, Asta and Yuno are both found abandoned at a church on the same day. While Yuno is gifted with exceptional magical powers, Asta is the only one in this world without any. At the age of fifteen, both receive grimoires, magic books that amplify their holder’s magic. Asta’s is a rare Grimoire of Anti-Magic that negates and repels his opponent’s spells. Being opposite but good rivals, Yuno and Asta are ready for the hardest of challenges to achieve their common dream: to be the Wizard King. Giving up is never an option!

ABOUT CRUNCHYROLL
Crunchyroll is the place to watch all your favorite anime! Stream new anime, full episodes, movies, OVAs, music, openings, endings, trailers and all the best moments in anime, subbed and dubbed!

▶ WATCH FULL ANIME EPISODES ON YOUTUBE: https://got.cr/cc-pt

🔶 GET YOUR FREE 7-DAY CRU

trending_videos.description:

WWE: Unreal Season 3 releases July 21, 2026.

trailer_and_breakdown.description: Trailer breakdowns and official trailers constitute a significant portion of trending content, indicating a strong audience interest in previews and detailed analyses of popular series.
examples: House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 4 Trailer Breakdown & Easter Eggs
HOUSE OF THE DRAGON Season 3 Episode 4 Trailer Breakdown | The Battle Of Tumbleton
Black Clover Second Season | Official Trailer 3 | Crunchyroll
trailer_and_breakdown.insight: Creating content that revolves around popular series and providing detailed breakdowns or insights can capture the attention of viewers interested in these series.

personal_and_experiential_content.description: Personal experiences and decision-making processes, such as escaping a tornado or making a college decision, are gaining traction.
examples: Making My College Decision… RTG Ep. #2
personal_and_experiential_content.insight: There is an opportunity to create content that shares personal stories or experiences, which can engage viewers on a more personal level.

gaming_and_challenges.description: Gaming content and challenge-based videos also appear among the trending videos.
gaming_and_challenges.insight: Creators can capitalize on the gaming community by producing content that involves gaming challenges or unique gameplay scenarios.

channel_diversity.description: Each channel only has one video in the trending list, suggesting a diverse range of content creators.
channel_diversity.insight: There is no single dominant channel, indicating that new or less established channels have the potential to trend given compelling content.

niche_focus.description: Channels tend to have a niche focus, such as anime, series breakdowns, or gaming.
examples: Emergency Awesome focuses on series breakdowns.
Anime Expeditions focuses on anime content.
niche_focus.insight: Focusing on a specific niche or theme can help creators build a dedicated audience and improve the chances of trending.

series_and_trailer_content.opportunity: High demand for content related to popular series and trailers.
series_and_trailer_content.actionable_insight: Create engaging content that provides detailed analyses or speculations about upcoming series episodes or movie releases.

personal_storytelling.opportunity: Personal storytelling and experiential content have significant viewer engagement.
personal_storytelling.actionable_insight: Develop content that shares authentic personal experiences or decision-making journeys to connect with audiences emotionally.

interactive_and_challenge_content.opportunity: Interactive gaming or challenge content is appealing to the audience.
interactive_and_challenge_content.actionable_insight: Produce interactive content such as live challenges or gameplay that encourages viewer participation and engagement.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
